name: Online-guided physical activity gut microbiome trial in healthy older adults
summary: Single-blinded randomized controlled trial testing an 8-week online-guided multicomponent physical activity intervention against active control in healthy older adults, with cognitive, brain-connectivity, cardiorespiratory fitness, and gut microbiome endpoints.
population: 92 healthy older adults, mean age 66.35 years

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Microbiome Composition Modulation because they can show whether the intervention changes function and biomarkers in 92 healthy older adults, mean age 66.35 years. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
